entries.content: noun | BrE ˈabstrakt, AmE ˈæbˌstræk(t) | ① uncountable (theoretical) 抽象 chōuxiàng▸ in the abstract 在抽象意义上 ② countable (summary) 摘要 zhāiyào ③ countable Art 抽象派作品 chōuxiàngpài zuòpǐn
entries.label: B
entries.name: noun | bre ˈabstrakt, ame ˈæbˌstræk(t) |

entries.content: transitive verb | BrE əbˈstrakt, AmE əbˈstræk(t), ˈæbˌstræk(t) | ① (summarize) 写…的摘要 xiě… de zhāiyào ‹information, book›② formal (remove) 提取 tíqǔ▸ abstract facts from a mound of periodicals 从一大堆期刊中摘取事实
entries.label: C
entries.name: transitive verb | bre əbˈstrakt, ame əbˈstræk(t), ˈæbˌstræk(t) |

entries.content: to abstract oneself reflexive verb | BrE əbˈstrakt, AmE əbˈstræk(t), ˈæbˌstræk(t) | ▸ to abstract oneself from sth 使自己脱离某事物 shǐ zìjǐ tuōlí mǒu shìwù
entries.label: D
entries.name: reflexive verb
